name: Merrie Crown Roast of Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
2. Season the meat with salt and pepper.
3. Place the roast in a large roasting pan, with the rib bones up.
4. Cover the rib bones with foil to prevent excessive browning.
5. Insert a meat thermometer so that the bulb rests in the center of the roast, not touching fat or bone.
6. Roast at 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) for 2 hours.
7. Prepare Savory Rice Stuffing (recipe to follow).
8. Fill the center of the roast with stuffing.
9. Continue roasting for 1½-2 hours longer until the meat is well done and the thermometer registers 170-180 degrees F.
10. Remove foil from rib tips.
11. Place the roast on a serving plate or carving board.
12. Garnish with Lady Apple Fruit Wreath (see previous recipe).
13. For ease in carving, insert a fork into the top of the roast; make slices by cutting close along the sides of the rib bones.
